overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a truck cabin driving through heavy rain on European highways and urban streets. The footage shows a journey from highway driving behind a delivery truck, through a right turn onto a road with railway barriers, and into a city center with traffic lights and modern buildings. This is clearly game engine footage from a truck simulator with realistic rain effects, windshield wipers, and detailed dashboard instrumentation.

events.description: ego vehicle turns right at intersection, following the brown delivery truck

agents.ego_description: driving on wet highway following a brown delivery truck, then turning right at a traffic light intersection

notable_agents.action: brown delivery truck driving ahead and turning right at the intersection

entered.detail: large brown box truck with red taillights directly ahead on the highway
metal barrier running along the left side of the highway
illuminated GPS navigation screen mounted on the dashboard showing route information

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a rain-soaked highway with heavy rain visible on the windshield and wipers in motion. The ego vehicle follows a brown delivery truck closely through the spray. At approximately 7 seconds, the vehicle turns right at an intersection, leaving the main highway. The dashboard GPS and instrument cluster are prominently visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: road with railway barriers and greenery

agents.ego_description: driving along a curved road with railway barriers on the left and trees on the right, maintaining steady speed in heavy rain

entered.detail: concrete and metal barrier separating the road from railway tracks on the left side
circular traffic sign visible in the distance on the right side of the road
dense green trees and bushes lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: After turning off the highway, the vehicle travels along a road bordered by railway barriers on the left and dense vegetation on the right. The rain continues heavily with wipers sweeping across the windshield. The road curves gently to the right with no other vehicles immediately nearby, creating a more isolated driving environment compared to the highway.

events.description: transitioning from rural road to urban environment as buildings appear on both sides

agents.ego_description: approaching urban area and slowing down behind a white box truck, preparing for traffic light

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving ahead and slowing down for red traffic light

entered.detail: multi-story residential and commercial buildings appearing on the right side
large residential apartment building with multiple windows on the left
large white commercial truck with red taillights ahead on the road
metal railway tracks running parallel to the road on the left side

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to an urban setting as apartment buildings and commercial structures appear on both sides of the road. The vehicle approaches a white box truck that is slowing down for a traffic light ahead. Tram tracks run parallel to the road on the left, and the rain-slicked streets reflect the city lights in the growing dusk.

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop behind white truck at red traffic light
traffic light changes to green and vehicle begins moving through intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red traffic light behind a white box truck, then proceeding through the intersection when the light turns green

notable_agents.action: white box truck stopped at traffic light, then moving forward through intersection

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on the road surface at the intersection
modern commercial buildings with large windows and storefronts on the right

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops behind a white box truck at a red traffic light in an urban intersection. The surrounding area features commercial buildings and apartment blocks. After waiting, the traffic light changes to green around 40 seconds, and the vehicle proceeds through the intersection, crossing the zebra markings and continuing into the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with mixed commercial and residential buildings

events.description: passing a red car and blue van parked along the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: driving through urban streets passing other vehicles and navigating between buildings in heavy rain

notable_agents.action: red car parked on the right side of the street near a tram stop

entered.detail: red sedan parked along the curb on the right side
blue commercial van parked on the right side of the street
contemporary building with large glass facade on the right
covered shelter for tram passengers on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle continuing through the urban city center, passing parked cars including a red sedan and blue van. The street is lined with modern glass buildings and older apartment blocks. Tram stops and street furniture are visible along the sidewalks. The heavy rain persists throughout, with windshield wipers maintaining visibility as the vehicle navigates the wet city streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-lashed highway into the heart of a dense urban center. It begins with the vehicle following a brown delivery truck through heavy spray, with windshield wipers sweeping across the glass and the dashboard GPS visible as the camera turns right off the main road. As the highway recedes, the scene shifts to a more isolated stretch bordered by railway barriers and dense vegetation before the environment gradually opens into a city setting filled with apartment buildings and tram tracks. The vehicle then slows to a halt behind a white box truck at a red traffic light, where the rain-slicked streets reflect the surrounding city lights in the growing dusk. Finally, the light turns green and the camera proceeds through the intersection, navigating past parked cars and modern glass buildings as the heavy rain persists throughout the city center.
